lines.speaker: Zombie monk
lines.text: What if I start craving brains?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Just eat a cauliflower or something!

lines.speaker: Zombie monk
lines.text: I don't even know what one of those is!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hang in there, brother, [player name] is on the case.

lines.speaker: Zombie monk
lines.text: Something fell off! Something fell off!

lines.speaker: Zombie monk
lines.text: I wish I was back in my own body.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm working on it, okay? Give me a minute.

lines.speaker: Zombie monk
lines.text: I can feel my brain thumping about in here when I shake my head.

lines.speaker: Zombie monk
lines.text: I don't want to be stuck this way!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Likely that's all in the mind...
